author: anon-581fd578
content: Delivered: vitreous_hot_reload fully implemented with protocol (ServerMessage/ClientMessage with serde JSON), server (notify file watcher + tokio-tungstenite WebSocket broadcast + debounce + auto-build), client (background thread + mpsc polling), and vitreous-cli (new/dev/build subcommands). 15 new tests, all 370 workspace tests passing, zero clippy warnings.
